extraction.one_line_summary: DENZ Nico won from a 29-rider breakaway after late chase group caught leaders with 800m to go, while ALMIRAI Bruno took maglia rosa from 18.5-minute deficit via mid-stage break reaction.
tactical_patterns: BAIS David attacked Passo Sempione summit specifically to reclaim KOM jersey after losing it previous day, showing calculated jersey defense.
ALMIRAI Bruno's group reacted when initial break gained 12+ minutes, exploiting INEOS's reluctance to chase with such deep time gaps.
Late four-man bridge (SCREAMS, BALLERINI, OLDANI, BETTIOL) caught at 800m despite nearly 1-minute gap, revealing sprint finish inevitability on flat runins.

rider_signals.DENZ Nico: positive: Second stage win in three days suggests exceptional current form, won uphill finish after chasing down leaders
rider_signals.GEE Derek: neutral: Third second-place finish of this Giro indicates consistently strong positioning but missing final acceleration
rider_signals.ALMIRAI Bruno: positive: Workhorse domestique gained 17 minutes in breakaway reaction, first French maglia rosa since 1999 shows opportunistic GC awareness
rider_signals.BAIS David: positive: Tactically attacked first-category summit specifically to reclaim KOM jersey, demonstrating jersey competition drives mid-race strategy
